name: Jam Tarts
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt the butter.
2. Blend in the cream cheese, maple syrup, and lemon juice.
3. Add the flour and combine until the dough is smooth.
4. Chill the dough overnight.
5. Roll the dough to a 1/4-inch thickness.
6. Cut into 3-inch rounds.
7. Make an indentation in the center of each tart.
8. Spoon jam into each indentation.
9. Bake on oiled cookie sheets at 450 degrees Fahrenheit for 15 minutes, or until the crust is golden brown and possibly flaking. If not, return to bake for additional few minutes.
